title: CoPilot Self Service Cancellation
summaryBody: Provide the ability for users to initiate cancellations and automatically inform the CoPilots. Reducing the largest volume of Support tickets for FreeAgent.
detailBody: Provide the ability for users to initiate cancellations and automatically inform the CoPilots. Reducing the largest volume of Support tickets for FreeAgent.
